description_long: This is a large, modern diesel-electric freight locomotive with a robust, rectangular body and a prominent cab at one end. The locomotive features a series of circular ventilation fans on the roof, handrails running along both sides, and a set of heavy-duty wheels and bogies beneath. The front and rear ends are marked with bold, chevron-patterned warning stripes, and the sides display detailed paneling, vents, and access doors. The exterior is primarily a light gray color with black accents, and the windows are small and rectangular, located near the cab. The overall design is utilitarian, built for hauling heavy freight loads across long distances on railways.
description: A large, gray diesel-electric freight locomotive with a rectangular body, roof fans, handrails, and chevron warning stripes at both ends.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cab, headlights, and bold chevron warning stripes.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, handrails, roof fans, and detailed paneling.
description_view_2: Rear view with chevron warning stripes and visible roof fans.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing handrails, roof fans, and side details.
attribute_window_arrangement: spaced rectangular windows near the cab
